description: Seasonal intelligence glyph mapping cyclical knowledge patterns. Intelligence has seasons — growth, maturation, harvest, dormancy — each governed by different Rosetta shapes and families.

seasons.description: New patterns germinate. High intake, low structure. Curiosity-driven exploration.
Patterns elaborate and branch. Maximum energy expenditure. Discovery cascades.
Patterns consolidate into stable structures. Integration and encoding.
Structures rest. Low energy. Deep reflection. Pruning of non-essential connections.

cycle_properties.note: Seasons are not calendar-bound. An intelligence may cycle through all four in minutes or decades. The pattern is scale-invariant.
